project_type: Jekyll static site with Ruby plugins, Liquid templates, SCSS, and JavaScript frontend (MapLibre/Leaflet maps, Bootstrap)
build_command: bundle exec jekyll build (requires Contentful env vars)
test_command: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-globalSetup (JS tests - globalSetup requires network for font download); bundle exec rspec (Ruby tests)
verification_instructions: 1. Run `bundle exec rspec` and confirm all tests pass. 2. Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-globalSetup` and confirm all tests pass. 3. Confirm no console.log statements in production JS. 4. Confirm SCSS uses @use/@forward not @import.
setup_instructions: npm install && bundle install && node scripts/copy-vendor-assets.js
environment_constraints: Network is limited - font downloads time out. Use --no-globalSetup flag for jest. Ruby 3.4.4 via mise (not chruby). NODE_OPTIONS must be unset before running jest/node.
contribution_requirements: SCSS must use @use/@forward (not @import). No console.log in production code. Geographic/tile constants centralised in _config.yml. No duplicated popup construction in layer-control.js. Dual-export pattern for testability in JS modules. Translation key parity (de.yml and en.yml must match). Coordinate validation via isFiniteCoordinate. HTML escaping via PaddelbuchHtmlUtils.escapeHtml. Tinylytics beacon dispatch on marker clicks. bindMarkerRecenter for map marker click-to-recentre behavior.
key_patterns: The spec/quality-and-tooling-hardening branch enforces: 1. Coordinate validation using isFiniteCoordinate/firstDefined helpers and warnIfOutsideBounds 2. No duplicated popup HTML - graceful degradation uses escaped-title-only popup via PaddelbuchHtmlUtils.escapeHtml 3. bindMarkerRecenter for spot markers 4. Tinylytics beacon dispatch on marker clicks 5. SCSS @use directive pattern 6. Delta merge/batch fetch pattern in contentful_fetcher.rb
directory_structure: _plugins/ = Ruby Jekyll generators and fetchers. assets/js/ = browser JS modules. _sass/ = SCSS (settings/, pages/, components/, util/). _includes/ = Liquid partials. _tests/ = Jest tests (unit/, property/). spec/ = RSpec tests. docs/ = documentation. _i18n/ = translation YAML.
